Module 6:
Introduction
!
Executive Summary
Congratulations on making it this far - it really is a big deal! You’re almost
done, only two modules to go.
In Module 6, we’re going to begin by covering your sales video. Now, you
don’t have to do a sales video, you could do a sales letter.
I’m going to walk you through a couple of real-life examples of sales videos
from very successful launches.
Then I’m going to walk you through the Joint Venture Launches. You’ll see
how you get Joint Venture partners, and how you can do one of those
launches to get massive leverage with your JV launch.
Remember, Product Launch Formula is a proven formula. It’s been proven
thousands of times by people with all kinds of businesses.
You’ve already put in most of the work here - now you just need to keep on
taking those baby steps and put your launch together.
!
